Title: Multiple Deliveries Ready
Description:
Hey,

Guess there was a technical glitch with our system that marked certain packages as delivered when they never were. Still untangling the mess, but have a few sorted out and good to go. 

- Package <EM4>#~mission(item1|serialnumber)</EM4> goes from <EM4>~mission(Pickup1|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Dropoff1|Address)</EM4>.
- Package <EM4>#~mission(item2|serialnumber)</EM4> goes from <EM4>~mission(Pickup2|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Dropoff2|Address)</EM4>.
- Package <EM4>#~mission(item3|serialnumber)</EM4> goes from <EM4>~mission(Pickup3|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Dropoff3|Address)</EM4>.
- Package <EM4>#~mission(item4|serialnumber)</EM4> goes from <EM4>~mission(Pickup4|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Dropoff4|Address)</EM4>.
- Package <EM4>#~mission(item5|serialnumber)</EM4> goes from <EM4>~mission(Pickup5|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Dropoff5|Address)</EM4>.
 
Would be good to get these rectified immediately if you’re available. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Best,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Itinerary:
DELIVERY ITINERARY

PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER)
     · Package #[item1|serialnumber] from [Pickup1|Address]
     · Package #[item2|serialnumber] from [Pickup2|Address]
     · Package #[item3|serialnumber] from [Pickup3|Address]
